body: Task: Audit the store side for Worker 1's live SSE replay integration and verify whether existing TaskReadModel::get(...) and ApprovalReadModel::get(...) are sufficient for a replay caller to hydrate mixed task/approval events without backend-specific branching. If a narrow store helper is truly needed, add only that smallest helper; otherwise leave proof, and if a small parity-style batch guard is the honest proof, add it and stop. Success criteria: one narrow store diff or one explicit proof note showing the replay caller can stay backend-neutral with current store traits, with no broad store behavior growth. Relevant files: crates/cairn-store/tests/cross_backend_parity.rs, crates/cairn-store/src/projections/task.rs, crates/cairn-store/src/projections/approval.rs, crates/cairn-store/src/in_memory.rs, crates/cairn-store/src/sqlite/adapter.rs, crates/cairn-store/src/pg/adapter.rs, .coordination/mailbox/worker-3.md.
